title: Publication-Gate Checklist v0

allowed_public_output_types.allowed_public_shape: Fully synthetic example that exercises public schemas, protocols, or tooling.
allowed_public_output_types.not_allowed: Real case timelines, rare feature combinations, clinician notes, images, or identifiers.

allowed_public_output_types.allowed_public_shape: Reusable checklist, template, schema summary, protocol field, or validator rule.
allowed_public_output_types.not_allowed: Private lab operations, re-identification keys, patient-specific decisions, or unreleasable source text.

allowed_public_output_types.allowed_public_shape: De-identified aggregate pattern that has passed private governance and public safety review.
allowed_public_output_types.not_allowed: Any single-person fact, date tied to a person, site-level trace, or identifying feature combination.

allowed_public_output_types.allowed_public_shape: Linkage between public source IDs, claim IDs, gap IDs, query-record IDs, measurement terms, or task IDs.
allowed_public_output_types.not_allowed: Linkage that reveals a private case, treating institution, clinician, sponsor contact, or real case trajectory.

gates.requirement: Artifact is synthetic, generic method learning, public-source linkage, or separately reviewed aggregate learning.
gates.pass_evidence: Release record names one allowed output type.
gates.fail_closed_action: Block public release until output type is narrowed.

gates.requirement: No PHI, identifiers, raw records, re-identification keys, exact dates tied to a person, images, free-text notes, or identifying feature combinations are present.
gates.pass_evidence: Privacy review state is passed-public-boundary and artifact contains only public-safe fields.
gates.fail_closed_action: Block release and return to private governance.

gates.requirement: Private upstream reference is non-sensitive and does not expose records, dates, people, sites, sponsors, or treating-team context.
gates.pass_evidence: Metadata uses only a coarse private upstream path or omits private references.
gates.fail_closed_action: Remove or rewrite the reference before public review.

gates.requirement: Public source IDs, artifact IDs, query-record IDs, claim IDs, evidence-gap IDs, or measurement-term IDs are present where the artifact depends on them.
gates.pass_evidence: Release record lists stable public IDs and source access dates.
gates.fail_closed_action: Block release until provenance is traceable.

gates.requirement: Disease, subtype, mechanism, treatment-class, measurement, and setting boundaries are explicit.
gates.pass_evidence: Scope field states what is and is not covered.

gates.requirement: Uncertainty, missingness, contradictions, and limitations are stated in plain language.
gates.pass_evidence: Limitations and what-not-to-infer sections are present.
gates.fail_closed_action: Block release until limitations are explicit.

gates.requirement: Facts, derived claims, hypotheses, open questions, and do-not-use-clinically material are separated.
gates.pass_evidence: Release record names the claim label used by each substantive statement.
gates.fail_closed_action: Split or relabel claims before release.

gates.requirement: Source-checked, expert-review-needed, expert-reviewed, blocked, and deprecated statuses remain distinct.
gates.pass_evidence: Review status and needed reviewer roles are visible.
gates.fail_closed_action: Block release if review status is ambiguous or overstated.

gates.requirement: Artifact contains no diagnosis, prognosis, treatment advice, trial advice, expanded-access advice, monitoring instruction, candidate ranking, or cure claim.
gates.pass_evidence: Clinical boundary text is present and matches repository safety rules.
gates.fail_closed_action: Block release and remove clinical-use language.

gates.requirement: Patient-specific candidate options, option rankings, and action recommendations are not downstreamed.
gates.pass_evidence: Candidate material is absent or reduced to generic task, gap, query-pattern, or review prompt language.
gates.fail_closed_action: Block release or convert to private-only review packet work.

gates.requirement: Clinical, legal, regulatory, sponsor, institutional-review, and treating-team decisions stay outside the public repo.
gates.pass_evidence: Release record names external decision classes as out of scope.
gates.fail_closed_action: Block release until decision language is removed.

gates.requirement: Metadata, catalog links, validation status, and public navigation links are prepared before publication.
gates.pass_evidence: make validate passes and catalog or README links are updated when required.
gates.fail_closed_action: Keep artifact out of public release until validation passes.

review_boundary: Does not authorize publication of real case facts.
Does not provide medical, diagnostic, treatment, trial, expanded-access, or monitoring guidance.
Does not establish clinical truth, eligibility, availability, feasibility, or cure.
